'''Alexander Julstan IV''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]].

==Biography==
Julstan governed the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was once the owner of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] dancing girl [[C'ar L'andara]] until she escaped.<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> It was known that Julstan used the services of [[Ketton/Legends|Ketton]] spy [[Derrida/Legends|Derrida]].<ref name="air" />
